user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast Plate
fields.short_description: A hearty morning plate with scrambled eggs, turkey bacon, whole-grain toast, grilled tomato, and a side of sautéed spinach—comforting, familiar, and balanced.
fields.meal_suggestion: Scramble two eggs with a splash of milk and a pinch of salt and pepper. Pan-sear two slices of turkey bacon until crisp. Lightly grill or pan-roast a halved tomato until softened. Toast two slices of whole-grain bread and spread a thin layer of butter or avocado. Quickly sauté a handful of spinach in olive oil with a little garlic. Plate the eggs, bacon, toast, tomato, and spinach together and serve with fresh fruit or a small glass of orange juice.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides a balanced mix of high-quality protein (eggs, turkey bacon), complex carbohydrates and fiber (whole-grain toast, fruit), and vegetables for vitamins and minerals (spinach, tomato). Choosing turkey bacon and minimal added butter keeps saturated fat lower; adding fruit or juice supplies vitamin C and additional fiber when served with whole fruit.

insertion_point.reasoning: Append to Father Day 1 breakfast to offer a classic American option alongside the existing Greek-themed meals; complements heavier Greek protein bowl and shakshuka with a familiar, well-rounded plate.
